overview: Foundation Direct Primary Care: Men's Health Clinic provides men's health services including testosterone replacement therapy, erectile dysfunction treatment, weight loss, and hair loss through a membership-based direct primary care model. All memberships include physician consultations and personalized treatment plans.
highlights: Membership-based direct primary care with no insurance billing
Comprehensive lab testing included (testosterone, CBC, CMP, iron, ferritin, FSH, LH, cortisol)
targetAudience: Men experiencing age-related symptoms, sexual health concerns, or weight loss challenges in South Alabama.
